zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana de Sandwich於大約1255年出生在英國英格蘭肯特普雷斯頓時，她的父親Henry de Sandwich37歲，母親Joan Auberville31歲。她於1265年10月16日之前與William de Leybourne在英國英格蘭肯特萊波恩結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1327年10月26日在英國肯特萊波恩享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana de Sandwich于大约1255年出生在英国英格兰肯特普雷斯頓时，她的父亲Henry de Sandwich37岁，母亲Joan Auberville31岁。她于1265年10月16日之前与William de Leybourne在英国英格兰肯特萊波恩结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1327年10月26日在英国肯特萊波恩享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sandwich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian   Sandvik   or   Sandvig  .
English (mainly Durham): from Sandwick in Martindale (Westmorland), from Old English sand or Old Norse sandr ‘sand’ + Old Norse vík ‘creek, bay’.

variants.name: Sandvik
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Anders, Bente, Lars, Morten, Ottar, Thorleif.
Swedish: ornamental name composed of the elements sand ‘sand’ + vik ‘bay’, ‘inlet’.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana de Sandwich was born about 1255, in Preston, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry de Sandwich, was 37 and her mother, Joan Auberville, was 31. She married William de Leybourne before 16 October 1265, in Leybourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 26 October 1327, in Leybourne, Kent, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana de Sandwich est née environ 1255, à Preston, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Sandwich, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joan Auberville, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William de Leybourne avant 16 octobre 1265, à Leybourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 octobre 1327, à Leybourne, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana de Sandwich um 1255 in Preston, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Sandwich 37 und ihre Mutter Joan Auberville 31. Sie hat vor 16. Oktober 1265 in Leybourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom William de Leybourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Oktober 1327 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Leybourne, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Sandwich è nata il circa 1255 nel Preston, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry de Sandwich, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Joan Auberville, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato William de Leybourne prima del 16 ottobre 1265, nel Leybourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 ottobre 1327, nel Leybourne, Kent, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana de Sandwichが約1255年にイギリスイギリスケントプレストンで生まれた時，父Henry de Sandwichは37歳，母Joan Aubervilleは31歳であった。1265年10月16日以前にイギリスイギリスケントリーボウルンでWilliam de Leybourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1327年10月26日にイギリスケントリーボウルンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana de Sandwich(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 플레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Sandwich(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Auberville(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1265년 10월 16일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리보우른에서 William de Leybourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1327년 10월 26일 영국 켄트 리보우른에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Sandwich nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Preston, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry de Sandwich, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joan Auberville, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Leybourne antes 16 de outubro de 1265, em Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de outubro de 1327, em Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana de Sandwich родилась около 1255 г. в местности престон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry de Sandwich было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Auberville, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Leybourne перед 16 октябрь 1265 г. в местности либурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 октября 1327 г. в местности либурн, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana de Sandwich nació aproximadamente 1255, en Preston, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry de Sandwich, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Joan Auberville, tenía 31 años. Se casó con William de Leybourne antes de 16 de octubre de 1265, en Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de octubre de 1327, en Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
